fixes.title: Reset sort to unsorted when clicking a different column header
fixes.description: US-001 AC03 requires that clicking a different header resets sort to none. Change the setSort callback so that prev.key !== id returns { key: null, direction: null } instead of { key: id, direction: 'asc' }.
fixes.before: if (prev.key !== id) return { key: id, direction: 'asc' }
fixes.after: if (prev.key !== id) return { key: null, direction: null }

fixes.title: Add MIN_COLUMN_WIDTH to measure.ts
fixes.description: FR-9 lists MIN_COLUMN_WIDTH as an expected constant. Add it with the standard value of 60.

fixes.title: Update setSort different-id test to expect unsorted result
fixes.description: The test 'setSort(different id) resets to asc on new column' must be updated to assert { key: null, direction: null } after the setSort fix.
